landing.heroSubtitle: Aura transforms your documents into a secure, searchable knowledge base. Zero hallucinations, 100% source-grounded answers.

bento.visualDesc: Ultra-robust chart rendering that survives malformed AI JSON. Supports 9+ interactive chart types.
bento.privacyDesc: Embeddings and inference stay local. Your private documents never leave your infrastructure.
bento.semanticDesc: Zero hallucinations. Every answer is linked back to a high-fidelity source chunk with infinite scroll-to-view.
bento.structuredDesc: Specialized Excel & CSV processing that maintains header context across thousands of rows.
bento.exportDesc: One-click export to high-res PNG, SVG or vector PDF.
bento.i18nDesc: Break language barriers with support for 10+ languages including native RTL (Arabic) support and intelligent localization.

security.title: Security is not an afterlife.
security.subtitle: It's our DNA.
security.desc1: Your documents are encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit via TLS 1.3.
security.desc2: Run Aura entirely on-premise. Your data never needs to touch the public cloud.
security.desc3: Advanced recovery engine prevents malformed AI responses and ensures 100% data accuracy.
security.desc4: Strict logical separation between user sessions prevents cross-contamination of context.

useCases.title: Real-World Applications
useCases.case1Desc: Accelerate literature review. Query across thousands of technical papers to find novel connections.
useCases.case2Desc: Review contracts and compliance documents. Instantly locate liability clauses and risky terms.
useCases.case3Desc: Synthesize user feedback and PRDs. Generate feature specs based on historical data.
useCases.case4Desc: A unified search for your company wiki, HR policies, and onboarding materials.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is my data used to train your models?
faq.a1: Absolutely not. Aura runs on an isolated architecture. Your data is indexed only for your private retrieval sessions and is never used for model training or shared with third parties.
faq.q2: Can I deploy this offline / air-gapped?
faq.a2: Yes. Aura supports full on-premise deployment via Docker containers, allowing it to run in completely offline or air-gapped environments for maximum security.
faq.a3: We currently support PDF, Microsoft Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), Markdown, and plain text. We are constantly adding new parsers.
faq.a4: Aura uses valid citations for every claim. If the information isn't in your documents, the system will explicitly state 'I do not have the answer' rather than hallucinating.

viz.title: One Answer.
viz.subtitle: Infinite Perspectives.
viz.desc: Aura doesn't just output text. It understands the underlying data and offers professional-grade visualizations instantly. Click below to experience the engine.

news.title: AURA Newsroom
news.subtitle: Latest technical updates and product announcements.

v124.title: AURA v1.2.4 Released: Native RTL Support and Local Llama 3.2 Integration
v124.summary: Platform upgrade focused on accessibility and local reasoning performance, introducing Level 4 RTL resilience and Llama 3.2 edge intelligence.
v124.content:
The AURA v1.2.4 release introduces two significant platform upgrades focused on accessibility and reasoning performance: native Right-to-Left (RTL) language support and the integration of Llama 3.2 for fully local reasoning. These enhancements further strengthen AURA’s position as a privacy-centric, trust-native Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system.

AURA now provides native support for RTL languages, including Arabic, Hebrew, and Persian. This update extends beyond interface-level alignment and ensures that document ingestion, semantic chunking, retrieval, and response rendering correctly preserve RTL structure. Document elements such as paragraphs, lists, tables, and inline citations are processed and displayed without structural distortion.

Version 1.2.4 integrates Llama 3.2 into AURA’s local inference pipeline. All reasoning, synthesis, and response generation continue to execute entirely on the user’s machine, preserving data sovereignty. Llama 3.2 improves local analytical reasoning for complex queries, response consistency, and time-to-first-token performance on consumer-grade hardware. This integration operates in conjunction with AURA’s CA-RAG framework, ensuring that all outputs remain grounded strictly in retrieved source documents.

AURA v1.2.4 retains the system’s deterministic verification mechanisms. Each response is accompanied by a confidence indicator derived from retrieval strength and contextual consistency. Inline citations remain fully traceable, allowing users to verify each claim against its originating document section, reducing hallucination risk in high-stakes environments.

llama.title: Next-Generation Local Reasoning with Llama 3.2 (3B / 1B)
llama.summary: AURA enables next-generation edge intelligence through fully local reasoning using Llama 3.2 1B and 3B variants.
llama.content:
AURA has integrated Llama 3.2 (3B and 1B variants) to enable next-generation edge intelligence through fully local reasoning. This integration strengthens AURA’s ability to deliver fast, privacy-preserving, and document-grounded inference on consumer-grade hardware, without reliance on cloud-based AI services.

The Llama 3.2 1B and 3B models are specifically optimized for low-latency execution in constrained environments. Their compact parameter size allows AURA to perform reasoning, synthesis, and verification entirely on-device, making the system suitable for personal workstations, offline research environments, and regulated enterprise systems.

Despite their smaller size, Llama 3.2 models demonstrate strong performance in analytical and multi-step reasoning tasks when combined with AURA’s RAG pipeline. The 3B variant is used for deeper analytical queries, while the 1B variant enables ultra-fast responses for factual and exploratory queries.

Llama 3.2 operates within AURA’s existing Confidence-Aware RAG (CA-RAG) framework. Every response generated is evaluated against deterministic confidence metrics. This integration ensures that improved reasoning capability does not come at the cost of reliability or transparency, advancing AURA’s vision of practical edge intelligence.

global.title: Global Language Expansion: 50+ New Localized Tongues
global.summary: AURA now supports over 50 localized languages with intelligent context switching and native script rendering.
global.content: We are excited to announce a massive expansion of AURA's linguistic capabilities. This update introduces support for 50+ new localized tongues, ranging from major global languages to regional dialects. Our intelligent context switching engine automatically detects the language of your primary documents and adapts the retrieval pipeline to maintain semantic accuracy. This expansion covers native script rendering, localized date formats, and culturally aware response synthesis, ensuring that AURA is truly accessible to everyone, everywhere.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: At Aura Intelligence ("we", "our", or "us"), we prioritize the privacy and security of your data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclosure, and safeguard your information when you access our platform.
privacy.securityText: Aura is designed as a privacy-first RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) platform.
privacy.securityLi1: Zero-Retention Inference: We do not use your data to train our foundational models.
privacy.securityLi2: Isolated Tenancy: Your documents and vector embeddings are stored in isolated namespaces, accessible only by your workspace.
privacy.securityLi3: Encryption: All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3).
privacy.collectText: We collect only the minimum information required to operate the service:
privacy.collectLi1: Account Information: Email address and authentication credentials.
privacy.collectLi2: Workspace Data: Documents you explicitly upload for processing.
privacy.collectLi3: Usage Metrics: Anonymized telemetry to improve system performance (e.g., latency, error rates).
privacy.rightsText: You maintain full ownership of your data. You may export or permanently delete your workspace and all associated vectors at any time from the settings dashboard.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptText: By accessing or using Aura Intelligence, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must not use our services.
terms.usageText: Aura grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the platform for your internal business or personal purposes, subject to these terms.
terms.usageLi1: You must not reverse engineer the underlying AI models.
terms.usageLi2: You must not use the platform for any illegal or malicious activities.
terms.usageLi3: You are responsible for all content uploaded to your workspace.
terms.ownerText: You retain all rights to the data you upload. Aura claims no ownership over your documents or the vectors generated from them.
terms.ownerDisclaimer: Disclaimer: The Aura platform uses generative AI. While we strive for accuracy (Zero Hallucination with RAG), we do not guarantee that all responses will be perfectly accurate. You should verify critical information.
terms.terminateText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access if you violate these terms or abuse the service API limits.
